name: python3-secretsocks
title: python3-secretsocks
description:
Socks server for tunneling connections (Python 3)
This package contains a Python SOCKS server for tunneling connections over
another channel.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-secretsocks because Socks server for tunneling connections (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-secretsocks as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-secretsocks with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-secretsocks --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
